ops.text: Fix CI log copying to include full text and hide the useless Edit button for logs
Update Dex Compiler to harvest dependencies and fix classpath errors

ops.replace_with:
- name: Fetch Dependencies
        run: |
          mkdir -p libs
          # Use gradle to just resolve and copy dependencies, not to build
          ./gradlew -q -PtargetDir="$(pwd)/libs" app:copyDependencies

      - name: Build Dex
        run: |
          chmod +x ./scripts/compile_dex.sh
          ./scripts/compile_dex.sh

ops.content:
#!/bin/bash

# Initialize Timer
START_TIME=$(date +%s)
echo "[#] Starting Raw Compilation at $(date)..."

mkdir -p build_tmp
mkdir -p output

# 1. Locate Android SDK & JAR
ANDROID_JAR="$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platforms/android-34/android.jar"

# 2. Prepare Classpath
echo "[#] Extracting JARs from AARs..."
cd libs
for aar in *.aar; do
    if [ -f "$aar" ]; then
        unzip -q -o "$aar" classes.jar -d "${aar%.aar}_extracted"
        mv "${aar%.aar}_extracted/classes.jar" "${aar%.aar}.jar"
        rm -rf "${aar%.aar}_extracted"
    fi
done
cd ..

# Build the CP string
CP_LIBS="."
for jar in libs/*.jar; do
    CP_LIBS="$CP_LIBS:$jar"
done
FULL_CP="$ANDROID_JAR:$CP_LIBS"

# 3. Collect all Kotlin files
SOURCES=$(find app/src/main/java -name "*.kt")

echo "[#] Phase 1: Running kotlinc..."
# We add -no-jdk and -no-reflect to keep it lean
kotlinc -cp "$FULL_CP" $SOURCES -d build_tmp -no-jdk -no-reflect

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "[!] Phase 1 FAILED."
    exit 1
fi

# 4. Dexing
echo "[#] Phase 2: Running d8..."
D8_TOOL=$(ls $ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/build-tools/34.*/d8 | head -1)

# We must include the library jars in d8 so it can resolve hierarchy
$D8_TOOL build_tmp/**/*.class --output output/ --lib "$ANDROID_JAR"

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "[!] Phase 2 FAILED."
    exit 1
fi

# Calculate Duration
END_TIME=$(date +%s)
DURATION=$((END_TIME - START_TIME))

echo "------------------------------------------"
echo "[+] COMPILATION SUCCESSFUL"
echo "[+] Total Duration: $DURATION seconds"
echo "------------------------------------------"

operations.replace_with:
- name: Fetch Dependencies
        run: |
          mkdir -p libs
          # Use gradle to just resolve and copy dependencies, not to build
          ./gradlew -q -PtargetDir="$(pwd)/libs" app:copyDependencies

      - name: Build Dex
        run: |
          chmod +x ./scripts/compile_dex.sh
          ./scripts/compile_dex.sh

operations.content:
#!/bin/bash

# Initialize Timer
START_TIME=$(date +%s)
echo "[#] Starting Raw Compilation at $(date)..."

mkdir -p build_tmp
mkdir -p output

# 1. Locate Android SDK & JAR
ANDROID_JAR="$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platforms/android-34/android.jar"

# 2. Prepare Classpath
echo "[#] Extracting JARs from AARs..."
cd libs
for aar in *.aar; do
    if [ -f "$aar" ]; then
        unzip -q -o "$aar" classes.jar -d "${aar%.aar}_extracted"
        mv "${aar%.aar}_extracted/classes.jar" "${aar%.aar}.jar"
        rm -rf "${aar%.aar}_extracted"
    fi
done
cd ..

# Build the CP string
CP_LIBS="."
for jar in libs/*.jar; do
    CP_LIBS="$CP_LIBS:$jar"
done
FULL_CP="$ANDROID_JAR:$CP_LIBS"

# 3. Collect all Kotlin files
SOURCES=$(find app/src/main/java -name "*.kt")

echo "[#] Phase 1: Running kotlinc..."
# We add -no-jdk and -no-reflect to keep it lean
kotlinc -cp "$FULL_CP" $SOURCES -d build_tmp -no-jdk -no-reflect

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "[!] Phase 1 FAILED."
    exit 1
fi

# 4. Dexing
echo "[#] Phase 2: Running d8..."
D8_TOOL=$(ls $ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/build-tools/34.*/d8 | head -1)

# We must include the library jars in d8 so it can resolve hierarchy
$D8_TOOL build_tmp/**/*.class --output output/ --lib "$ANDROID_JAR"

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "[!] Phase 2 FAILED."
    exit 1
fi

# Calculate Duration
END_TIME=$(date +%s)
DURATION=$((END_TIME - START_TIME))

echo "------------------------------------------"
echo "[+] COMPILATION SUCCESSFUL"
echo "[+] Total Duration: $DURATION seconds"
echo "------------------------------------------"
